home.title: Literary Classics,
home.subtitle: Experience the world's greatest literature through AI-generated video scenes. Click a passage, watch it unfold.
home.quoteText: In an age of endless scrolling, what if every page came alive?
home.quoteSub: CLIP-IT turns the text you read into the scene you see — instantly.
home.demoTitle: Highlight the text. Watch the scenes play.
home.demoSubtitle: Drag across a passage like a highlighter — every block it covers plays as a video, one after another, with no loading in between.
home.demoDragHint: Drag across the text to play scenes
home.howItWorksSub: Three simple steps to a richer reading experience.
home.featureReadDesc: Explore classic literary texts divided into immersive blocks
home.featureWatchDesc: AI-generated video scenes bring each passage to life
home.featureExperienceDesc: Click any text block and watch the scene unfold instantly
home.libraryTitle: Six timeless classics, waiting for you.
home.librarySub: From Gatsby's gilded parties to Sherlock's foggy London — start anywhere.
home.ctaSub: Create a free account and dive into your first chapter.

library.title: Library
library.subtitle: Your curated collection of literary masterpieces and saved works.
library.noResults: We couldn't find any books matching your search.

reader.selectBlock: Select a text block to play its scene
reader.selectHint: Drag across the text to highlight — the matching scenes play back-to-back
reader.noBlocks: No text blocks in this chapter

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to continue your literary journey
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.confirmSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email

bookmarks.title: Bookmarks
bookmarks.subtitle: Your saved works and passages.
bookmarks.emptyHint: Tap the bookmark icon on any passage while reading to save it here.
bookmarks.emptyWorksHint: Tap the bookmark icon on a book in the library to save it here.

notes.subtitle: Your personal annotations, grouped by work.
